betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Digamma Particle§f

§aThe mysterious §cdigamma§f — an optional particle that unlocks the most exotic RBMK fuels!§f

The §bDigamma Particle§f is a mysterious and extremely exotic particle that can be optionally produced — it does not affect main progression but unlocks powerful optional content. It requires §e70,000 momentum§f in the particle accelerator, making it the most demanding PA recipe in the mod.

§6Production§f:
Recipe: §bHiggs Boson Capsule§f + §bSparkticle Capsule§f @ §e70,000 momentum§f
→ The Digamma Particle + Empty Particle Capsule

§6Uses§f:
§b• §bDigamma RBMK Fuel Rod§f — crafted at a crafting table:
  Recipe (shapeless): Balefire RBMK Fuel Rod + The Digamma Particle → Digamma RBMK Fuel Rod
§b• §bDigamma Laser Crystal§f — for specialized equipment
§b• §bDigamma Fuel§f — can be recycled in a SILEX to obtain Undefined
§b• §bMurky Anvil§f — requires Undefined from digamma recycling

§cWarning§f: The digamma particle is the most momentum-intensive recipe in the PA. You need the best coils (Large Chlorophyte Coils) and a well-designed accelerator. Even a small mistake in the PA layout will result in particle crashes at this energy level!

§eTip§f: Digamma is completely optional. Skip it if you're focused on DFC progression. However, if you want the most powerful RBMK fuels and the Rod of Discord, digamma is the path.
